flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Northwest Iowa Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.5k → $7.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Northwest Iowa Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.8k → $7.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Northwest Iowa Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (55.0% vs 60.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northwest Iowa Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).
